news.summary: In a recent update on the employment landscape, it was reported that more than 500,000 new jobs were added to the economy last month, exceeding market expectations. The unemployment rate dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. Additionally, average hourly wages saw a 2.5% increase, reflecting positive growth in the job market. These numbers indicate a strengthening economy and a positive outlook for job seekers in the near future.

news.headline: AGM Group Holdings Inc. partners with Nowlit Canada to boost high-performance computing capabilities.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, AGM Group Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AGMH), a technology company focused on assembling and selling high-performance hardware and computing equipment, revealed that they have entered into a new agreement.

news.headline: Lowell Farms Inc. appoints Philippe Faraut as CFO. It's a cannabis company with advanced production capabilities.
news.summary: In Salinas, California on December 20, 2024, Lowell Farms Inc. appointed Philippe Faraut as the new Chief Financial Officer. The company, known for its advanced cannabis production processes, operates under tickers CSE: LOWL and OTCQX: LOWLF. Philippe Faraut's appointment is effective immediately, highlighting the company's focus on bolstering its financial leadership.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk started a share repurchase programme worth up to DKK 20 billion on 11 November 2024, lasting for 12 months.
news.summary: In Denmark, on 11 November 2024, Novo Nordisk, a pharmaceutical company, began a share repurchase plan per European regulations. The program, guided by the Safe Harbour Rules, is a component of a broader initiative to buy back shares worth a total of DKK 20 billion over one year starting 6 February 2024.

news.headline: The house could vote on a temporary fix to shutdown at 10am - Fox News.
Bitcoin fell 10% to $92,250, Ethereum down 16% at $3,115, XRP dropped 18%, Dogecoin cratered 28% due to Fed policy change.
news.summary: On Friday, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) experienced a sharp decline of around 10%, reaching a low of $92,250. This drop was attributed to the Federal Reserve's recent "hawkish" 0.25% rate cut, alongside profit-taking and technical market factors, according to experts. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) also followed suit, plunging 16% to $3,115. Ripple (CRYPTO: XRP) witnessed an 18% decrease, while BNB (CRYPTO: BNB) dropped by 12% to $618. Among smaller cryptocurrencies, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) suffered a massive 28% crash, with Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) and SUI (CRYPTO: SUI) each losing approximately 25% of their value in the past 24 hours. Forest Bai, Co-founder of Foresight Ventures, pointed to the Federal Reserve's hawkish stance and decreased rate cut expectations as key drivers of the market downturn, leading to a tightening of macro liquidity. Bai emphasized that this pullback in Bitcoin signifies the first significant market correction since the post-U.S. election period.

news.headline: Indiana has $39 billion worth of projects under construction, led by Eli Lilly's $30 million expansion.
news.summary: Industrial Info is tracking industrial construction projects in Indiana valued at over $39 billion, with various sectors such as pharmaceutical-biotech and data centers included. Eli Lilly and Company's (NYSE:LLY) expansion in Lebanon, about 30 miles from Indianapolis, is the biggest project in the state.

news.summary: The latest report reveals that approximately 3,500 new COVID-19 cases were recorded today. Hospitalizations due to the virus have surged to over 700, placing a strain on the healthcare system. Sadly, the death toll has risen to 50, with a significant increase in fatalities among younger individuals. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus and protect public health.

Noise, leading smartwatch brand, to debut at CES 2025 with "Made in India" wearables like Luna Ring and ColorFit Pro.
news.summary: Noise, India's top smartwatch brand supported by Bose, is set to exhibit its premier range of smart wearables at an international platform in Las Vegas on December 20, 2024. The showcase will feature the acclaimed Luna Ring, ColorFit Pro smartwatch series, and a highly anticipated premium audio flagship. The company's collaboration with Bose has garnered significant attention, solidifying its position in the competitive market.

Audius partners with ICE to expand royalty access for 330,000 music rights holders through blockchain.
news.summary: Audius has announced a groundbreaking multi-territory licensing deal with ICE, offering royalty prospects for more than 330,000 music rights holders through blockchain technology.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: Incoming data shows consumer spending and growth are much stronger; disagreement about neutral rate.
Knife River to acquire Strata Corporation for $454 million, a leading construction company in ND and MN.
news.summary: BISMARCK, North Dakota - Knife River Corporation (NYSE: KNF) has revealed its agreement to purchase Strata Corporation, a prominent provider of construction materials and contracting services in North Dakota and northwestern Minnesota. The acquisition is valued at $454 million based on Strata's anticipated 2025 Adjusted Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization (EBITDA), representing a multiple in the high single digits. Established in 1910, Strata is a vertically integrated company centered on aggregates, boasting over 75 aggregate operations.

Impending shutdown as President-elect Trump and Elon Musk's influence sparks crisis, putting federal government on the brink.
news.summary: The incoming president, Donald Trump, along with entrepreneur Elon Musk, have begun shaping policies even before Trump officially takes office. Their influence has pushed the federal government to the brink of a shutdown, just hours away before potential closure.

Madison Liquidators partners with Corp Design to introduce stylish glass conference tables to their product lineup.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on December 20, 2024, Madison Liquidators revealed their latest addition to their online office furniture collection. They have introduced sleek glass conference tables from Corp Design, further enhancing their product range. This move signifies their commitment to offering top-notch office furniture and keeping up with modern design trends.

Latch (soon to be DOOR) completes restatement, files 2022 Annual Report on Form 10-K on Dec 19, 2024, with Quarterly Reports on Form 10-Q for June 30, 2022 & Sept 30, 2022.
news.summary: St. Louis-based Latch, Inc., soon to be known as DOOR, has completed a restatement and filed its 2022 Annual Report on Form 10-K with the SEC. This move was confirmed on December 19, 2024, and the Company also submitted its Quarterly Reports on Form 10-Q for the quarters ended June 30, 2022, and September 30, 2022. This marks a significant update following previous announcements.

Publisher Britannica embraces A.I., evolving in digital era. Contemplates going public as digital learning giant.
news.summary: The company that produces encyclopedias was at risk of failing due to the popularity of Wikipedia. However, it has successfully transformed into a leading digital education provider and is considering the possibility of conducting an Initial Public Offering (IPO).

news.headline: Zimmer Biomet to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan. 14, 2025, at 8:15 a.m. PT.
news.summary: In Warsaw, Indiana on December 20, 2024, Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. disclosed that their management team will speak at the upcoming 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. The presentation is scheduled for January 14, 2025, at 8:15 a.m. Pacific Time. Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) and the SIX Swiss Exchange under the ticker symbol ZBH.

news.headline: Ballard secures orders for 90 fuel cell engines, totalling 6.4 MW for European bus market.
news.summary: Ballard Power Systems has revealed that they have received orders from two bus manufacturers to provide more than 90 fuel cell engines for the European and UK city bus market. This amounts to about 6.4 megawatts (MW) of total rated power. This development was announced in Vancouver, BC, on December 20, 2024. The company's stocks are listed on NASDAQ as BLDP and on TSX as BLDP.

news.headline: Alabama land-grant institutions assist families with "heirs property" through Extension System; important support provided statewide.
news.summary: In Auburn, Alabama, as of December 20, 2024, land-grant institutions are actively engaging in efforts to assist families grappling with "heirs property" concerns by offering guidance and resources at various Alabama Cooperative Extension System facilities across the state. Ryan Thomson, serving as an assistant within this initiative, plays a key role in delivering support and information to these families.
